attributes.title: [RL] Fine-Tuning Data Drift
attributes.description: Side-by-side comparison of the GCS training snapshot vs the live Cloud SQL lineage database. Shows how dataset coverage, depth, source types, and field distribution change as new papers are added. Re-run sync_finetuning_elasticsearch.py to refresh the live index.
